detectors.description:
Birthday_Gift.PutGift(address)._reciver (Birthday_Gift.sol#25) lacks a zero-check on :
		- reciver = _reciver (Birthday_Gift.sol#39)

Birthday_Gift.GetGift() (Birthday_Gift.sol#67-83) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- reciver == msg.sender && now > unlockTime (Birthday_Gift.sol#75)
detectors.markdown:
[Birthday_Gift.GetGift()](Birthday_Gift.sol#L67-L83) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [reciver == msg.sender && now > unlockTime](Birthday_Gift.sol#L75)

detectors.description:

	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.19 (Birthday_Gift.sol#1)
